product: Genie APIs and Research Agent in Beta
tagline: Genie Create and Update APIs in Beta: Genie Create and Update APIs have been released to Beta.
what_it_does: Genie Create and Update APIs in Beta: Genie Create and Update APIs have been released to Beta. Get API has been updated to allow users to retrieve a serialized definition of the Genie Space. Research Agent in Beta: Research Agent extends Genie's capabilities to help you uncover deeper insights and tackle complex business questions using multi step reasoning and hypothesis testing.
why_it_matters: How can we reduce order cancellations this holiday season?
